title: Movable Reinforced Deepslate
description: A mod that enables pistons to move Reinforced Deepslate.
body:
This mod allows pushing and pulling of Reinforced Deepslate blocks just like in the first snapshot they were introduced in. This enables players to make use of this unbreakable block making it not just a fancy bedrock but something more.

This mod is only required on server to function. However to prevent visual glitches it is recommended to install it on client as well.
